Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.TubeRuptureRelief

Packages that use TubeRuptureRelief
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure
 

  • Uses of TubeRuptureRelief in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure that return TubeRuptureRelief
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setDischargeCoefficient(double dischargeCoefficient)
    Sets the discharge coefficient applied to the rupture flow area.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setHighPressureBara(double highPressureBara)
    Sets the high-pressure side pressure, normally the maximum operating pressure.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setHighPressureFluid(SystemInterface highPressureFluid)
    Sets the high-pressure side fluid used to evaluate the relieving-fluid properties.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setHighTemperatureC(double highTemperatureC)
    Sets the high-pressure side temperature.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setLowPressureBara(double lowPressureBara)
    Sets the low-pressure side pressure into which the rupture discharges.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setMolarMassKgPerMol(double molarMassKgPerMol)
    Sets the gas molar mass to use when no fluid is supplied.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setName(String name)
    Sets the scenario name.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setNumberOfOpenEnds(int numberOfOpenEnds)
    Sets the number of open ends presented by the rupture.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setSpecificHeatRatio(double specificHeatRatio)
    Sets the gas specific-heat ratio Cp/Cv to use when no fluid is supplied.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setTubeInnerDiameterM(double tubeInnerDiameterM)
    Sets the tube inner diameter.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    TubeRuptureRelief.setTubeInnerDiameterMm(double tubeInnerDiameterMm)
    Sets the tube inner diameter in millimetres.
